title: CustomItemGUI
description: Simple GUI to create vanilla item with displayname, lore, enchants, attributes, flags.
body:
The Minecraft 1.20.1 Paper plugin serves as a convenient tool for creating custom items far more easily than using standard Minecraft commands. This plugin significantly streamlines the item creation process, allowing for the swift generation of unique and custom items within the game.

Moreover, in the near future, I am planning to integrate custom enchantments and 3D skin systems for items. These additions will further enhance the diversity and creativity of the items within the Minecraft world, introducing unique enchantments and visually appealing 3D skins for items, making the gameplay experience more immersive and exciting.

Command:
/opengui
